title: 2025-2026 Academic Year Fall Semester single-course exam
content:
2025-2026 Academic Year Fall Semester single-course exam

Dear Students,

Students who wish to take a single-course exam at the end of the Fall Semester of the 2025-2026 Academic Year must submit their applications, along with their transcripts signed and approved by their academic advisor, through the Application Tracking System (

https://online.uskudar.edu.tr/

) on our Faculty's website between February 16-20, 2026.

Students whose advisors approve them to take single-course exams will have their exams held between February 23-27, 2026, on a date deemed appropriate by the course instructor.

We wish all our students success.
